description_long: This bungalow is a sprawling, single-story residential structure with a large, L-shaped footprint and multiple attached and detached elements. The main building features a mix of flat and gently sloped roof sections, with a prominent open patio or deck area and several green lawn patches integrated into the layout. There are multiple outbuildings and structures, including what appears to be a garage, a pool area, and several small sheds or gazebos. The property is landscaped with clusters of trees and open paved areas, suggesting a suburban or semi-urban setting. Windows and doors are distributed asymmetrically, with some grouped and others spaced apart, and the overall design emphasizes open outdoor living spaces. The materials appear to be a combination of concrete, glass, wood, and metal, with a neutral color palette accented by green lawns and brown paved surfaces.
description: A large, single-story bungalow with an L-shaped layout, multiple outbuildings, open patios, and landscaped green areas. The structure features flat and gently sloped roofs, asymmetrical window placement, and a mix of concrete, glass, and wood materials.
description_view_0: From this view, the bungalow's L-shaped layout, central patio, and adjacent green lawn are prominent, with outbuildings and trees visible in the background.
description_view_1: This angle highlights the garage area, the extended paved driveway, and the arrangement of trees and outbuildings along the property edge.
description_view_2: Here, the pool area, multiple small structures, and the spread of trees across the property are most visible, with the main building's roof and patio in the background.
description_view_3: This view emphasizes the open green spaces, the main entrance area, and the alignment of outbuildings and patios along the side of the bungalow.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped and spaced windows
